title: SENIOR PRESCRIPTION DISCOUNT PROGRAM - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY PORTLAND TABERNACLE SENIOR PRESCRIPTION DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prescription assistance to older adults. Must change prescription to Salvation Army's authorized pharmacy. 8495 SE Monterey Avenue Happy Valley, OR 97086 Eligibility: Age 60 and older who meet income guidelines and are either uninsured or underinsured Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm, by appointment only Email (503) 239-1224 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 239-1224 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income, and copy of prescription or prescription bottles AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Entrance is on SE 85th Avenue Services: Prescription Expense Assistance * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FREE FOOD MARKET LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - CAMP KURATLI If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SALVATION ARMY PORTLAND TABERNACLE
